subcodes.first_line: O friends of God in Shín and Há! Hearken with radiant ears unto the call of the Wronged One. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله فی الشین و الهاء ندای مظلوم را بلغت نورآء اصغا نمائید انه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
